title: Selenipedium × schroederae
taxonomy: Selenipedium × schroederae is a hybrid orchid species. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as a member of the genus Selenipedium. Specifically, it is a cross between Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium palmifolium or Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium steyermarkii (varies with sources). Further classification puts it in the tribe Cypripedioideae and subtribe Selenippiinae. It is an epiphytic orchid with unique characteristics.
